name: Prompt Cache Reuse (Sonnet 4.6, Wave 2)
description: Baseline for cache_control placement. Run TWICE via external shell loop (the harness has no --runs flag). First run seeds the cache; second run should show cache_read tokens in the usage if OpenCode's prompt prefix matches CC's byte-for-byte.
expectedBehavior: system[0] identity block carries cache_control: {type: 'ephemeral'}. anthropic-beta contains prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05. Run 2 anthropic-beta header is a SUPERSET of run 1 (sticky-on latching).
